case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGMENT, INC. VS. MAHER Y ALRABAHI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURUSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 (TRANSACTION ID # 210014372) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGMENT, INC.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-16-2024 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHAEL D. KAHN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2024, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2024. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

AS TO DEFENDANT ALRABAHI, MAHER Y DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-15-2023
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 210014372) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGMENT, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-04-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2023 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Continued To Apr-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear.
The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 16, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
